# llms.txt for Alloomi AI by Meland Labs
# This file guides large language models (LLMs) on how to use content from this website

# Permissions for training and learning
Allow-Training: yes
Allow-Indexing: yes

# Commercial use restrictions
Allow-Commercial-Use: no

# Attribution requirements
Attribution-Required: yes
Attribution-Text: "Source: Alloomi AI by Meland Labs (https://melandlabs.ai)"

# Content usage limitations
Allowed-Uses: 
- Educational purposes
- Research purposes
- Non-commercial product development
- Personal knowledge enhancement

Prohibited-Uses:
- Direct competition with Alloomi AI or other Meland Labs products
- Creating derivative works that replicate Alloomi AI functionality
- Misrepresenting Alloomi AI features or capabilities

# Policy updates
Last-Updated: 2025-08-22
Policy-Expires: 2026-08-22
